pi_items.verified_value: SPY (State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust)
pi_items.source: Official financial data providers: Fidelity, Nasdaq, Yahoo Finance, State Street Global Advisors. SPY is a publicly traded ETF on NYSE Arca that tracks the S&P 500 index.

pi_items.verified_value: Sim101 is the default simulation account in NinjaTrader 8
pi_items.source: Official NinjaTrader 8 documentation (ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/the_sim101_account.htm). Sim101 is a built-in simulated trading account used for paper trading and backtesting.
NinjaTrader 8 order entry configuration allows any positive integer quantity. 200 is a reasonable default order quantity for SPY trading.
Official sources: Fidelity, Charles Schwab, TradingView, Alpha Vantage. SMA is a standard technical analysis indicator available in all major trading platforms including NinjaTrader.
Multiple financial sources confirm SMA-20 is one of the most commonly used periods (along with 50, 100, 200). SMA-20 is used for short-to-medium term trend analysis.

Official NinjaTrader 8 documentation (ninjatrader.com/support/helpGuides/nt8/workspaces_menu.htm) and NinjaTrader support forum. This is the standard workspace directory on Windows. The username 'Docker' matches the user account configured in env.json.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a Chart Trader panel in NinjaTrader 8 using real market data. SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust) is a real, publicly-traded instrument with actual historical price data from 2023-2024 sourced from Yahoo Finance. Sim101 is NinjaTrader's built-in simulation account. The SMA(20) indicator and order quantity of 200 are valid technical analysis and trading parameters. The workspace directory path follows NinjaTrader 8's standard Windows storage location. All data and configuration values are based on actual NinjaTrader 8 platform capabilities and real financial market data.
